item.name: Greener Gleaner
item.description:
Good at hiding, but clearly not good enough.

Use item to acquire the greener gleaner minion.
item.tooltip:
Waiting is boring,
like watching moss
grow on rocks.
   - Vanu Scout
item.specialactiondescription:
Delivers 10 points of damage every second to all enemies within range.
Duration: 20s
